basic_details.job_title: ZSS Boudh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Medical Officer, Counsellor and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Medical Officer, Counsellor and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Zilla Swasthya Samiti Boudh (ZSS Boudh) Medical Officer, Counsellor and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 17 June 2026 on the official website www.boudh.nic.in. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced through the ZSS Boudh Medical Officer, Counsellor and More Posts Recruitment 2026.

selection_process: As per NHM Odisha Office Order No. 3418 dated 12.03.2018
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ZSS Boudh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.boudh.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ZSS Boudh Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ZSS Boudh Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ZSS Boudh Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ZSS Boudh Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ZSS Boudh Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: As per NHM Odisha Office Order No. 3418 dated 12.03.2018

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ZSS Boudh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.boudh.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ZSS Boudh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ZSS Boudh Various Medical and Paramedical Posts is 04 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for ZSS Boudh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies for various Medical and Paramedical posts released by Zilla Swasthya Samiti Boudh.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ZSS Boudh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the official website for ZSS Boudh?
faq.answer: The official website for Zilla Swasthya Samiti Boudh is www.boudh.nic.in.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any application fees for ZSS Boudh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What type of job is offered by ZSS Boudh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The posts offered under ZSS Boudh Recruitment 2026 are on a Contractual basis.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 1385.

faq.question: Q8. Which state is ZSS Boudh located in?
faq.answer: Zilla Swasthya Samiti Boudh is located in the state of Odisha.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process is as per NHM Odisha Office Order No. 3418 dated 12.03.2018.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the detailed eligibility criteria and salary information?
faq.answer: Detailed eligibility criteria, age limits, and salary information for each post can be found in the official notification PDF released by ZSS Boudh.
